description: Capability matrix the v0.1 binding publishes. Per PRD-300-R28 / A15 every flag is set truthfully: ssr-walk + concurrent are implemented (true); static-ast (compiler-cli scanner), streaming (Angular has no public streaming API), suspense, headless-render, and rsc are all v0.1 follow-up milestones / not-applicable in Angular's v0.1 SSR (false). The PRD-303-R20 published target table flips static-ast to true once the compiler-cli scanner lands (MINOR per PRD-108-R4(5)).
